features: WALKING AND TRAVEL AID FOR LEFT HANDED USERS: Can offer extra stability and support when walking inside or out
10 HEIGHT ADJUSTMENT: The height adjustments between 710-940mm with no tools required making these ideal walking stick for most users
COMFORTABLE AND ERGONOMIC DESIGN: With a handle designed for comfort this has 10 heights adjustments with no tools required
ROBUST AND STURDY: Made from durable lightweight materials Maximum user weight 120kg (18 9 Stone)

AIDAPT: Aidapt is a well-established manufacturer and distributor of healthcare equipment, mobility solutions and personal aids Our products are designed to assist the elderly and less able in their daily lives
description: The two section Walking Stick features an ergonomically designed hand grip specifically for left-handed use, it is height adjustable with 10 settings to choose from for a perfect fit. The Walking Stick features a hanging strap for storage and a hardwearing rubber foot to prevent slips.
